evidenceSnippetOriginal: Research that involves people, personal data, or sensitive topics may require ethics approval, a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA), and data-governance controls before using any AI tool.
evidenceLocator: dAIsy Use Policy Section 5(iii) - Responsible uses: Research use
